title: Monsoon Crunchy Chinese Beetroot Robata-Grill Buddha Jumps Over Wall
description: A crunchy, briny, and flavorful Chinese-inspired dish featuring roasted beetroot, crispy fermented dough, and a variety of spices, all grilled to perfection on a robata grill. This recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner or a special occasion.
instructions: Preheat the robata grill to medium-high heat.
Peel and chop the beetroot into 2 cm cubes.
Cut the fermented dough into 1 cm thick slices.
In a small bowl, mix together the ginger, garlic, soy sauce, sesame oil, Szechuan peppercorns, salt, and black pepper.
Brush the beetroot and dough slices with the vegetable oil and season with the ginger-garlic mixture.
Grill the beetroot and dough slices for 5 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
Remove the grilled beetroot and dough from the grill and set aside.
Grill the scallions for 2 minutes on each side, or until slightly charred.

To assemble the dish, place a layer of grilled beetroot on the bottom of a serving plate, followed by a layer of crispy fermented dough, then a layer of grilled scallions, and finally a sprinkle of fresh cilantro.
Repeat the layers one more time, finishing with a layer of crispy fermented dough on top.
